# A Framework for Demographic Parity via Optimal Transport

## Problem Setup

### Why multivariate fairness is needed

## The Dependent Risk Pricing Problem

### Neural Network, shared information

## Post-processing Towards the Barycenter

### The 1-dimensional case

### Scaling

## The cost of fairness

<!-- Cite multiple references, e.g. [@kaplanmeier58; @cox72; @leecarter92]. -->
